top_signals.title: US Stocks Fall as Oil, Yields Resume Climb; Walmart, Deer Slide
top_signals.summary: US stocks retreated as oil and Treasury yields resumed their climb, with traders awaiting concrete signals on progress toward a Middle East peace deal and retail giant Walmart Inc. warning about the pinch of higher fuel prices. Nvidia Corp.’s earnings did little to reignite momentum in the artificial-intelligence trade.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Estonian State Fleet Orders Ice-Class Hybrid-Electric Ferry
top_signals.summary: The march toward zero-emission ferry transportation continues, and this time the momentum is coming from the Baltic.Estonian State Fleet has signed a contract with Polish shipbuilder CRIST S.A. for the design and construction of what will become Estonia’s first fully electric passenger ferry…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
